title: Mossel Bay Food Lover’s Market: Best in Fresh
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be voted...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be voted Best Fresh Produce Store in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be voted Best Fresh Produce Store in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From your full trolleys to your loyal votes, thank you for letting us be part of your shopping experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since our very first store opened its doors in Access Park, our mission has been simple: to bring you the freshest seasonal fruit and vegetables at the best possible value.","html":"Since our very first store opened its doors in Access Park, our mission has been simple: to bring you the freshest seasonal fruit and vegetables at the best possible value."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether it’s crisp apples or juicy citrus, our fruit and veg section is always bursting with colour, flavour and abundance, and our secret ingredient is our strong, long-standing relationships with our local farmers. These partnerships ensure our shelves are stocked with produce harvested at its peak.","html":"Whether it’s crisp apples or juicy citrus, our fruit and veg section is always bursting with colour, flavour and abundance, and our secret ingredient is our strong, long-standing relationships with our local farmers. These partnerships ensure our shelves are stocked with produce harvested at its peak."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But there’s so much more to discover beyond our fresh fruit and veg.","html":"But there’s so much more to discover beyond our fresh fruit and veg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Start your morning with the irresistible smell of our scratch bakery, where breads and pastries are available warm and fresh from the oven.","html":"Start your morning with the irresistible smell of our scratch bakery, where breads and pastries are available warm and fresh from the oven."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dive into the taste of the ocean with our frozen fish, sourced straight from the beautiful Mossel Bay coastline.","html":"Dive into the taste of the ocean with our frozen fish, sourced straight from the beautiful Mossel Bay coastline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Head over to our butchery for the perfect cut of meat for your next braai or dinner, or stock up on all your everyday groceries. Whatever’s on your shopping list, we’ve got it all in one store - convenient for you.","html":"Head over to our butchery for the perfect cut of meat for your next braai or dinner, or stock up on all your everyday groceries. Whatever’s on your shopping list, we’ve got it all in one store - convenient for you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our roots in Mossel Bay run deep. We are not just about food; we are about people.","html":"Our roots in Mossel Bay run deep. We are not just about food; we are about people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through various outreach programmes, we provide daily meals for 160 underprivileged children because changing lives is the way we do business.","html":"Through various outreach programmes, we provide daily meals for 160 underprivileged children because changing lives is the way we do business."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For long-term impact, we’ve started vegetable gardens in the community to teach self-sustainability.","html":"For long-term impact, we’ve started vegetable gardens in the community to teach self-sustainability."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the heart of it all is store manager Sheldon Wienand with nine years of experience as a manager and 19-and-a-half years of retail experience in general. Sheldon is passionate about offering Mossel Bay residents a wonderful shopping experience every single time.","html":"At the heart of it all is store manager Sheldon Wienand with nine years of experience as a manager and 19-and-a-half years of retail experience in general. Sheldon is passionate about offering Mossel Bay residents a wonderful shopping experience every single time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winning Best Fresh Produce Store isn’t just a title, it’s a reflection of our promise to bring you real value and real food every day, while making a real difference in our community.","html":"Winning Best Fresh Produce Store isn’t just a title, it’s a reflection of our promise to bring you real value and real food every day, while making a real difference in our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To every customer who shops at Food Lover's Market Mossel Bay, supports us, and voted for us - thank you.","html":"To every customer who shops at Food Lover's Market Mossel Bay, supports us, and voted for us - thank you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
